overview:
## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the connection between the specified nodes has been locked with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKObstacleGraph/lockConnection(from:to:)] method; otherwise, [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Discussion

By default, adding obstacles with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKObstacleGraph/addObstacles(_:)] method disconnects pairs of nodes if the direct path between them intersects an obstacle. This behavior ensures that using the findPathBetweenNodes:toNode: method does not result in a path through the graph that crosses obstacles. With certain nodes, this behavior might not be desirable—use the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKObstacleGraph/lockConnection(from:to:)] method to protect a connection between nodes from being automatically destroyed and the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKObstacleGraph/unlockConnection(from:to:)] method to remove such protection.

# isConnectionLocked(from:to:)

**Instance Method**

Returns a Boolean value indicating whether the specified nodes are protected from disconnection due to the addition of obstacles.

## Declaration

```swift
func isConnectionLocked(from startNode: NodeType, to endNode: NodeType) -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **startNode**: A node in the graph.
- **endNode**: Another node in the graph to which the node `startNode` is directly connected.

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the connection between the specified nodes has been locked with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKObstacleGraph/lockConnection(from:to:)] method; otherwise, [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Discussion

By default, adding obstacles with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKObstacleGraph/addObstacles(_:)] method disconnects pairs of nodes if the direct path between them intersects an obstacle. This behavior ensures that using the findPathBetweenNodes:toNode: method does not result in a path through the graph that crosses obstacles. With certain nodes, this behavior might not be desirable—use the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKObstacleGraph/lockConnection(from:to:)] method to protect a connection between nodes from being automatically destroyed and the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKObstacleGraph/unlockConnection(from:to:)] method to remove such protection.

## Locking Node Connections

- **lockConnection(from:to:)**: Prevents the specified nodes from being disconnected due to the addition of obstacles.
- **unlockConnection(from:to:)**: Allows the specified nodes to be disconnected due to the addition of obstacles.
